headline: A Look At Wolverine World Wide (WWW) Valuation After Leadership Changes And Credit Rating Upgrade
summary: Wolverine World Wide (WWW) is back in focus after reshaping leadership in its Work Group and receiving a credit rating upgrade from S&P Global Ratings, putting governance and balance sheet quality in the spotlight for stock watchers. See our latest analysis for Wolverine World Wide. Recent leadership changes and S&P’s upgraded credit rating come as Wolverine World Wide trades at US$17.01, with a 1 month share price return of 4.94% but a year to date share price decline of 6.59%, while the 1...
